parameters.query:
SELECT u.id, u.first_name, u.level, u.native_lang, u.target_lang, u.utc_offset
FROM users u
WHERE u.is_opted_in = true
  AND u.last_seen_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  AND ((EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')::int + u.utc_offset + 24) % 24) = u.lesson_hour
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM daily_lesson_sessions dls
    WHERE dls.user_id = u.id
      AND dls.started_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '20 hours'
  )
ORDER BY u.id;

meta.notes: Daily lesson scheduler: runs hourly, dispatches to users whose local lesson_hour matches current UTC hour. Sends flashcard sessions with SM-2 scheduling.
